Our Story

A Hidden Jungle Escape
In Wayanad

Nestled deep within the ancient forests of Meppadi, via the legendary Soochipara Waterfalls trail, Jungle Beats Resorts is a world apart — a sanctuary where the jungle's rhythm becomes your heartbeat.

Every cottage, every treehouse, every winding path was crafted with one purpose: to let you feel the pulse of nature without sacrificing a single luxury. Imagine waking to birdsong cascading through your skylight, sipping morning chai on a canopy balcony as mist drifts through ancient trees.

Here, adventure and serenity coexist effortlessly. Explore winding jungle trails by day, then surrender to plush comfort by night in our architecturally unique treehouse retreats — each one a love letter to Wayanad's extraordinary wilderness.

Where You Sleep

Luxury Treehouse &
Cottage Experiences

Eleven distinct retreats — from misty A-frame treehouses to curved golden pods — all enveloped by Wayanad's ancient forest.

Signature Suite

The Canopy Treehouse

Our iconic A-frame rises among the trees, its warm lantern glow beckoning through the jungle dusk. Suspended above the forest floor, an experience unlike any other.

Honeymoon Villa

Jungle View Suite

100% Nature
Immersion
The Jungle Experience

A Day Lived in
Nature's Rhythm

01

Forest Mornings

Rise to birdsong filtering through your skylight. Sip freshly brewed chai on your canopy balcony as morning mist weaves between ancient trees.

02

Adventure Trails

Set out on guided treks to Soochipara Waterfalls, Aranamala Peak and secret forest paths that reveal Wayanad at its most magnificent.

03

Pool & Sunset Evenings

Drift in a glowing jungle pool as golden hour transforms the forest, then gather at JB Café beneath string lights for unforgettable meals.

04

Night in the Canopy

As fireflies flicker through the trees, retreat to your treehouse cocoon — warm light, cool air, and the ancient forest breathing softly all around you.

Discover Wayanad

Where the Western Ghats
Touch the Sky

Wayanad is Kerala's best-kept secret — a highland district draped in mist, ancient forest and waterfall thunder. From our doorstep, the legendary Soochipara Waterfalls cascade through primeval rock just minutes away.

Aranamala Peak offers sunrise panoramas that steal the breath from even seasoned travellers. The landscape lives and breathes — cardamom plantations, hornbills in the canopy, and streams finding their way down to the valley below.

Soochipara Waterfalls Aranamala Peak Nature Trails Meppadi Village Scenic Valleys Birding Routes

Dining Experience

JB Café — Dining
Under the Canopy

Tucked within a mesh of climbing vines and fairy lights, JB Café is where jungle ambience meets culinary soul. The open-air space breathes with the forest — Edison bulbs sway gently overhead while the scent of Kerala spices drifts through the trees.

Our menu honours the land: freshly sourced ingredients, traditional Kerala recipes elevated for the modern palate, and breakfast spreads that set the mood for a day of adventure. Morning coffee never tasted this wild.

Whether a candlelit dinner for two or a long family breakfast before a waterfall trek, JB Café is the living heart of Jungle Beats.

Guest Stories

Voices from the
Jungle

★★★★★

"Waking up to birdsong in the treehouse was like stepping into another world entirely. Jungle Beats isn't just a resort — it's a feeling you carry home."

Arjun & Priya Menon
Kochi, Kerala · Honeymoon Stay
★★★★★

"The golden pod cottage was unlike anything I've seen in Kerala. Every morning we had breakfast overlooking the jungle and every night the pool glowed like something from a film."

Roshni Nair
Bangalore, Karnataka · Family Getaway
★★★★★

"JB Café's food was phenomenal — we'd sit there for hours, lost in conversation with the forest humming around us. The trek to Soochipara was the adventure of a lifetime."

Vikram Sharma
Mumbai, Maharashtra · Solo Adventure
★★★★★

"Our children fell in love with the playground and trails. But honestly, it was the adults who were most enchanted — by the silence, the stars, and the sheer beauty of it all."

The Krishnan Family
Chennai, Tamil Nadu · Family Holiday
